ValidationRule.description:
This VR will prevent users from editing Genetic Testing Opps that are in a Supplements Shipped stage
Operations, New Operations System Administrator, HG SysAdmin Finance, New Finance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Supplements Shipped"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvW"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9a"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001iU5h"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a000001OuCRAA0"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvl"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9G") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Supplements Have Been Shipped.
